ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ambulance_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ambulance service */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the service's information */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the ambulance service company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the services provided */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the ambulance service */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the service is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the service is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service (e.g., New, Active) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the ambulance service */,
  "lbn_legal_name" TEXT /* Legal business name of the provider */,
  "authorized_official" TEXT /* Name of the authorized official associated with the service */,
  "enumeration_date" TEXT /* Date the service was enumerated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the service record */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., Org, Sole) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact person */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact person */,
  "service_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of patients the service can transport */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Geographic area covered by the service */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles in the service's fleet */,
  "equipment_list" TEXT /* List of medical equipment available in the ambulances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of service */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., Ground, Air) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each service type */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time for each service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., New, Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each status */,
  "status_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of each status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ambulance service */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., Org, Sole) */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization or sole proprietorship */,
  "organization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organization or sole proprietorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES ambulance_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address history record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ambulance service */,
  "old_address" TEXT /* Previous address of the service */,
  "new_address" TEXT /* New address of the service */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the address was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_history_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES ambulance_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_history" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact history record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ambulance service */,
  "old_phone" TEXT /* Previous contact phone number */,
  "new_phone" TEXT /* New contact phone number */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact information was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_history_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES ambulance_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ambulance service */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance audit */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., Compliant, Non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the audit */,
  "audit_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the compliance audit */,
  "corrective_actions" TEXT /* Corrective actions taken by the ambulance service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES ambulance_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ambulance service handling the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the service request */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service request */,
  "requestor_name" TEXT /* Name of the person making the service request */,
  "requestor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the person making the service request */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location for the patient */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location for the patient */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests or instructions for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES ambulance_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact person */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient's emergency contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
